accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury PDA (must already exist from initialize_treasury)

accounts.name: treasury_ata
docs: Treasury's ATA for this mint (created if missing)

accounts.name: treasury_authority
docs: Authority allowed to initiate treasury payouts

accounts.name: recipient
docs: This account is constrained indirectly through `recipient_ata`,
which must be the associated token account for `(recipient, mint)`.

accounts.name: recipient_ata
docs: Created if missing, paid by treasury_authority.

accounts.name: receipt
docs: Current canonical SPL pay receipt derivation:

accounts.name: treasury_authority
docs: Treasury authority allowed to withdraw (must match treasury.authority)

accounts.name: user
docs: Recipient wallet receiving the tokens (does not need to sign)

accounts.name: user_ata
docs: Recipient ATA for that mint (create if missing; paid by treasury_authority)

errors.name: UnauthorizedWithdraw
errors.msg: Only the treasury authority may withdraw.

errors.name: UnauthorizedPause
errors.msg: Only the treasury authority may pause/unpause.

errors.name: InvalidUserProfileAuthority
errors.msg: User profile authority does not match the signer.

types.name: Receipt
docs: - Different instructions may derive receipt PDAs differently.
are the durable source of truth for downstream indexing and audits.

fields.name: user
docs: Counterparty / user wallet associated with this receipt.
- For deposit/withdraw flows, this is the user wallet involved.
- For pay flows, this is the recipient wallet.

fields.name: mint
docs: SPL mint for SPL flows, or Pubkey::default() for SOL flows.

fields.name: fee
docs: Fee charged in the same unit as `amount`.

fields.name: pre_balance
docs: User-side balance snapshot before the operation.
Zero when not captured by the flow.

fields.name: post_balance
docs: User-side balance snapshot after the operation.
Zero when not captured by the flow.

fields.name: tx_count
docs: Canonical per-flow index snapshot captured when this receipt was created.
- For current SPL pay flows, this stores `treasury.pay_count` BEFORE increment.
- Other flows may use different indexing semantics.

fields.name: v2
docs: Fixed-size extension payload for future-proof metadata.

fields.name: spl_mint
docs: Redundant with `Receipt.mint`, but useful for forward compatibility.

fields.name: memo_len
docs: Memo length in bytes. Zero when absent.

fields.name: memo
docs: Fixed-size memo buffer. Only the first `memo_len` bytes are meaningful.

types.name: Treasury
docs: This account represents the canonical treasury authority used by the
protocol for privileged treasury actions and PDA-signed SPL transfers.
- stores the monotonic SPL pay counter used for pay receipt indexing

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority allowed to perform privileged treasury actions.

fields.name: paused
docs: When true, treasury-gated value-moving instructions must reject.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for the canonical treasury account.

fields.name: pay_count
docs: Monotonic counter for SPL pay receipt indexing.
Current SPL pay receipts are derived using:
This counter must increase exactly once for each successful SPL pay.

types.name: UserProfile
docs: PDA that tracks a user's activity with the protocol (deposit/withdraw, SOL/SPL).

fields.name: tx_count
docs: Total number of protocol transactions performed by this user
